variants: Ravinder Tickoo was born on Cloudmarsh Isle, where his early fascination with technology began. He is a current resident of Horizonmist Shuttle, where he continues to innovate and create. He is also the author of the influential work, Umbra Link Array, which has garnered attention from industry leaders. In his spare time, he enjoys being a part of the Thunderwood Percussionists, a club dedicated to music and rhythm.
